'''Craddock Karath''' was a journeyman laborer, an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]], and the father of five children, the oldest of whom was [[Saul Karath]]. He was stationed at the Republic [[Foerost Shipyards|shipyards]] near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Foerost/Legends|Foerost]] when the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] and [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Crusaders|forces]] arrived and [[Battle of Foerost (Great Sith War)|took them over]], and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the battle. His son Saul had a grudge against Captain [[Dace Golliard]] ever since, because the captain had fled the battle, which resulted in the slaughter of Craddock and the other workers by the Krath and Mandalorians.
